name: Job Hunter
tagline: Watches LinkedIn for roles matching your CV and pre-fills Easy Apply for your approval.
example_cmd: apply to 5 Senior React jobs in Berlin posted today
author: CtxAnt core

name: Deal Finder
tagline: Babysits Amazon / Target / Best Buy for prices. Pings when something drops below your threshold.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Inbox Triage
tagline: Sorts unread mail into need-reply / skim / archive-me. Knows your VIPs. Never touches legit senders.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Morning Digest
tagline: Daily briefing: calendar, inbox highlights, and a few news topics in one short Telegram message.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Researcher
tagline: Opens the top sources on a topic and returns a structured summary with links.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Social Poster
tagline: Cross-posts the same update to Twitter, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky in parallel tabs.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Lead Tracker
tagline: Scans your CRM for warm leads that need follow-up and sends the next actions worth doing.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Meeting Prep
tagline: Builds a short pre-call brief from calendar, CRM, and company context.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Support Triage
tagline: Groups urgent support tickets so you know what needs fast human attention.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Invoice Collector
tagline: Checks billing portals for new invoices and summarizes what changed.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Marketplace Monitor
tagline: Watches saved marketplace searches and pings only for new matching listings.
author: CtxAnt core

name: Web Runner
tagline: Your generic browser worker for any repeatable task you want to save and schedule.
author: CtxAnt core
